log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Vedalken — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Vedalken — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Vedalken — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Vedalken — Unarmored Caster.
→ Vedalken — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 20] FAIL! 38 necrotic damage. HP: 29/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
